rawIntent: Build initial screeen. Screen should welcome user and show one button to start. Currently start button should show a message that system is yet to be developed. system shall be developed with react.js and node.js backend

successCriteria.description: A screen is displayed that welcomes the user and shows a start button. Clicking the start button displays a message indicating the system is yet to be developed.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Development of the full system functionality beyond the initial screen and start button message
